diagnosis: The player completed the level in 83 seconds with zero deaths and only one hit taken, rating it 4/5. The trace shows steady forward progress with brief pauses at elevated platform clusters (around x=1800-2000 and x=3200-3300) where vertical navigation was required, but no falls or repeated failures. The comment explicitly states enemies were too easy and requests more moth and flying enemies, indicating combat triviality rather than platforming issues. The level's platforming structure provided adequate engagement (hence the 4/5), but enemy placement failed to create meaningful threat density or variety along the critical path.

lessons.lesson: Enemy density and type variety must scale with level length and platforming complexity — sparse or homogeneous enemy placement on a long horizontal traversal creates a combat vacuum that undermines engagement even when platforming is solid.
conditions: enemy count is low relative to traversal time
enemy types lack diversity (e.g., only ground-based or single archetype)
player completes level with minimal hits and zero deaths
lessons.outcome: player rates level highly for platforming but explicitly calls out combat as too easy, requesting more and varied enemies

save_reason: Solid platforming structure with good vertical variety and fair challenge — only needs enemy density and type tuning to reach 5/5.
